title: Is Licensed to Carry
summary: You carry a gun and you know how to use it in a fight.
tiers: Tier 3: Trained Gunner or Damage Dealer
Tier 6: Special Shot or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: Misfire or jam! The attack fails and the action is lost, plus an additional action is needed to fix the problem.
text: You carry a gun and you know how to use it in a fight. (Although Is Licensed to Carry is designed with modern firearms in mind, it could apply to flintlock weapons, futuristic laser blasters, or other ranged weapons.)
details: You carry a gun and you know how to use it in a fight.
(Although Is Licensed to Carry is designed with modern firearms in mind, it could apply to flintlock weapons, futuristic laser blasters, or other ranged weapons.)
